span.p:
SAPWAT Calculator
CropType + IrrigationSystem + Area
→ mm/ha/a → Total m³

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ELU Scenario Builder
Builds all 9 scenario inputs
(Proclamation, PreviousSurveys,
PossibleExisting, PossibleLawful,
Registration, PresentDay, GA)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ELU Calculator
Determines per scenario
(surface + borehole):
LandHa, CropHa, VolumeM3, Source
→ PossibleExistingLawful,
PossibleUnlawful,
PossibleUnlawfulIncrease/Decrease

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Dam Volume Calculator
Method 1 (Wall): WallLength × Fetch × Depth × Factor / 2
Slope = R1/C1 → Depth = Fetch/Slope
Method 2 (Area): AreaHa × DepthM × Factor × 1000
ShapeFactors: Triangle=0.33 Square=0.4 Circle=0.5

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SFRA Calculator
Qualify period hectares & volume
Current period hectares & volume
Registered vs actual
ELU, unlawful, lawful, Pre-1972
